description: This API is the second release of the API that returns FACTS device real quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, rval = fcddat_2(name, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the facts device quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Desired active power flow at terminal end bus in MW.
Same as ‘PDES’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Desired reactive power flow at terminal end bus in Mvar.
Same as ‘QDES’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Voltage setpoint at sending end bus.
Maximum shunt current at sending end bus in MVA at unity voltage.
Same as ‘SHMX’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Maximum bridge real power transfer in MW.
Same as ‘TRMX’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Minimum voltage at terminal end bus in pu.
Maximum voltage at terminal end bus in pu.
Maximum series voltage in pu.
Maximum series current in MVA at unity voltage.
Same as ‘IMX’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Reactance of the dummy series element in pu.
Active power into series element at sending end bus in MW.
Same as ‘PSEND’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Reactive power into series element at sending end bus in Mvar.
Same as ‘QSEND’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Active power into series element at terminal end bus in MW.
Same as ‘PTERM’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Reactive power into series element at terminal end bus in Mvar.
Same as ‘QTERM’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Active bridge power exchange in MW.
Same as ‘PBRDG’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Reactive power into shunt element in Mvar.
Same as ‘QSHNT’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Series voltage magnitude.
Flow into series element at sending bus end in MVA.
Same as ‘MVASND’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Flow into series element at terminal bus end in MVA.
Same as ‘MVATRM’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Flow into shunt element in MVA.
Same as ‘MVASHN’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Current flow into series element at sending bus end in pu.
Current flow into series element at terminal bus end in pu.
Current flow into shunt element in pu.
Current flow into series element at sending bus end in amps.
Current flow into series element at terminal bus end in amps.
Current flow into shunt element in amps.
Percent series current loading at sending bus end.
Percent series current loading at terminal bus end.
Percent shunt current loading.
Percent bridge real power loading.
Percent of contributed vars.

error_codes.description: No base kV at bus; ‘RVAL’ returned = per unit current.
For quantities which are solution results, the FACTS is blocked or out-of-service; “V” of 0.0 returned.
